## Known Z-Wave Devices
- 2x Garage tilt sensors (different models, one is Ecolink TILT-ZWAVE2.5-ECO)
- 2x Temperature/motion/humidity sensors (wired/powered mode)
- 1x Wired smart switch
- 1x Wired smart plug
- 1x Battery-powered thermostat

## Controller
- **Stick**: Zooz ZST39 LR (800 Series Long Range USB Controller)
- **USB Path**: `/dev/serial/by-id/usb-Zooz_800_Z-Wave_Stick_533D004242-if00`
- **Home ID**: 4284737364
